scripts.skills:adminapi: openapi-to-skills ./src/adminapi.yaml -o ./references -n adminapi -f && rm -f ./references/adminapi/SKILL.md && mv ./references/adminapi/references/* ./references/adminapi/ && rm -rf ./references/adminapi/references && rm -f ./references/adminapi/authentication.md
scripts.skills:openapi: openapi-to-skills ./src/openapi.yaml -o ./references -n openapi -f && rm -f ./references/openapi/SKILL.md && mv ./references/openapi/references/* ./references/openapi/ && rm -rf ./references/openapi/references && rm -f ./references/openapi/authentication.md
